# Red's Barber Shop — Salem, OR
> Red's Barber Shop is a barbershop in Salem, Oregon for fades, classic cuts, beard trims and hot-towel shaves. Bilingual (English/Spanish). 3300 Market St, Ste 11. Call (503) 371-8955. A Market Street shop for classic cuts and line-ups — walk-ins welcome.

## Services
- Haircuts & Fades
- Beard & Line-up
- Hot-Towel Shave
- Kids' Cuts
- Designs & Details

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 371-8955 · Hours: Walk-ins & appointments — call for today's hours · Languages: English, Español
